---
title: "New DDC Players by Year"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-02"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
library(knitr)
```

```{r load-data}
ddc_data <- read_csv(
  here("data", "output", "ddc_full_tournament_data_auto.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

all_levels <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")
included_divisions <- "Open"
last_year <- 2025
growth_start_year <- 2010
```

This analysis counts a player as "new" in the first year they appear in the filtered tournament data. The plots use Open division results from A-D level tournaments through `r last_year`. The hard-coded `last_year` excludes incomplete current-year data.

```{r build-player-debuts}
player_level_years <- ddc_data %>%
  filter(
    Division %in% included_divisions,
    Level %in% all_levels,
    !is.na(Year),
    Year <= last_year
  ) %>%
  select(Year, Level, Player1, Player2) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Player1, Player2),
    names_to = "PlayerRole",
    values_to = "Player"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Player = trimws(Player)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Player), Player != "") %>%
  distinct(Year, Level, Player)

make_new_players_by_year <- function(player_years, end_year = last_year) {
  player_debuts <- player_years %>%
    group_by(Player) %>%
    summarize(FirstYear = min(Year), .groups = "drop")

  year_range <- seq(min(player_years$Year), end_year)

  player_debuts %>%
    count(FirstYear, name = "NewPlayers") %>%
    rename(Year = FirstYear) %>%
    right_join(tibble(Year = year_range), by = "Year") %>%
    mutate(NewPlayers = replace_na(NewPlayers, 0L)) %>%
    arrange(Year) %>%
    mutate(CumulativeNewPlayers = cumsum(NewPlayers))
}

player_years_all_levels <- player_level_years %>%
  distinct(Year, Player)

new_players_by_year <- make_new_players_by_year(player_years_all_levels)

kable(head(new_players_by_year, 10))
kable(tail(new_players_by_year, 10))
```

```{r plot-new-players}
ggplot(new_players_by_year, aes(x = Year, y = NewPlayers)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "New Open Division DDC Players by First Appearance Year",
    subtitle = "A-D level tournaments",
    x = "First appearance year",
    y = "New players"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r plot-cumulative-new-players}
ggplot(new_players_by_year, aes(x = Year, y = CumulativeNewPlayers)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "tomato", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative New Open Division DDC Players",
    subtitle = "A-D level tournaments",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Cumulative players"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Growth By Tournament Level, 2010-2025

```{r growth-by-level}
make_growth_summary <- function(series, label, start_year = growth_start_year, end_year = last_year) {
  growth_period <- series %>%
    filter(Year >= start_year, Year <= end_year)

  players_at_start <- series %>%
    filter(Year < start_year) %>%
    summarize(Players = max(CumulativeNewPlayers, 0L)) %>%
    pull(Players)

  players_at_end <- series %>%
    filter(Year <= end_year) %>%
    summarize(Players = max(CumulativeNewPlayers, 0L)) %>%
    pull(Players)

  years_in_period <- end_year - start_year + 1
  new_players_added <- sum(growth_period$NewPlayers)
  avg_new_players_per_year <- mean(growth_period$NewPlayers)
  median_new_players_per_year <- median(growth_period$NewPlayers)

  growth_pct <- if (players_at_start > 0) {
    (players_at_end / players_at_start - 1) * 100
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }

  annualized_growth_rate <- if (players_at_start > 0) {
    (players_at_end / players_at_start)^(1 / years_in_period) - 1
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }

  growth_model <- lm(CumulativeNewPlayers ~ Year, data = growth_period)

  tibble(
    Level = label,
    Period = paste(start_year, end_year, sep = "-"),
    PlayersAtStart = players_at_start,
    PlayersAtEnd = players_at_end,
    NewPlayersAdded = new_players_added,
    AverageNewPlayersPerYear = round(avg_new_players_per_year, 1),
    MedianNewPlayersPerYear = median_new_players_per_year,
    TotalGrowthPercent = round(growth_pct, 1),
    AnnualizedGrowthRatePercent = round(annualized_growth_rate * 100, 2),
    LinearGrowthPlayersPerYear = round(unname(coef(growth_model)[["Year"]]), 1)
  )
}

new_players_by_level <- bind_rows(lapply(all_levels, function(level) {
  player_level_years %>%
    filter(Level == level) %>%
    distinct(Year, Player) %>%
    make_new_players_by_year() %>%
    mutate(Level = level)
}))

growth_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(all_levels, function(level) {
    level_series <- new_players_by_level %>%
      filter(Level == level)

    make_growth_summary(level_series, level)
  }),
  make_growth_summary(new_players_by_year, "Combined A-D")
)

kable(growth_summary)
```

```{r plot-growth-period}
growth_period <- new_players_by_year %>%
  filter(Year >= growth_start_year, Year <= last_year)

ggplot(growth_period, aes(x = Year, y = CumulativeNewPlayers)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(size = NewPlayers), color = "tomato", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "New players") +
  labs(
    title = paste("Cumulative Player Growth,", growth_start_year, "to", last_year),
    subtitle = "Point size shows number of first-time players in each year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Cumulative players"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
